title: carya × demareei
intro: Carya × demareei is a hybrid plant, resulting from the cross between Carya illinoensis (also known as the Pignut Hickory) and Carya cordiformis (the Bitternut Hickory). The medicinal properties of Carya × demareei include its use as a diuretic, helping to reduce fluid retention and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and aid in weight management. Carya × demareei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and promote a balanced digestive system.
